subComponents.name: CalendarTitle
subComponents.description: Navigation header with left chevron, month/year label, and right chevron.

subComponents.name: DayItemSimpleCalendar
subComponents.description: Individual day cell. 40×40px. Appearance determined by state + type combination.

anatomy.description: Outer card surface. 382px wide, border-radius 16px, elevation/light/02 shadow. Background: --surface/neutral/default.
Header row: left chevron (24px) + month/year label (Manrope Bold 14px) + right chevron (24px). Full width, space-between.
Row of 7 abbreviated day labels (SUM–SAT). 40px height per cell, equally distributed. Manrope Regular 11px, --text/placeholder.
5–6 rows of 7 DayItemSimpleCalendar cells each, representing all days of the displayed month plus overflow days from adjacent months.

states.name: Default
states.description: Standard view. No date selected. No today or planned indicator visible.

states.name: Today
states.description: A day has a planned indicator dot (type=Planned). Represents today or a day with a scheduled activity.

states.name: Active
states.description: A date is selected (dark circle background, inverted text). A planned indicator may also be visible on a different day.

dayItemStates.description: Standard selectable day. Plain date number.
Out-of-month day (previous or next month overflow). Not selectable.
Day with a planned event. Date number + 6×6px dot indicator below.
Currently selected day. Dark 36×36px filled circle background, inverted date text.

variantNote: No structural variants. Single visual style.
sizeNote: Single size. Container: 382px wide. Day cell: 40×40px.
weekdayOrderNote: Confirmed from Figma. Week starts on Sunday.
usageContext: Single-date selection in a monthly calendar view.
Displaying planned activity indicators on specific days.
Used in scheduling, trip planning, and date-picker contexts.
notes: Composite component: CalendarSimple wraps CalendarTitle + weekday header row + DayItemSimpleCalendar grid.
Week starts on Sunday — confirmed from Figma.
Out-of-month overflow days use state=Disable to fill the 7-column grid.
The indicator dot (Planned days) and selected background circle are image assets in Figma — exact color tokens not confirmed.
The 'today' prop on DayItemSimpleCalendar has only 'off' confirmed. 'on' value presumably marks today's date.
TODO: Confirm indicator dot color token.
TODO: Confirm selected background circle color token.
TODO: Confirm whether Planned + Selected states can coexist on the same day.
